idea-plugin.name: i18n Strings Editor
idea-plugin.description:
Visual side-by-side editor for Lyricist-based Kotlin i18n string files.

  • Edit all locales in a single table — no more jumping between files
  • Add, rename, and delete keys and groups with full PSI-backed refactoring
  • Shift+F6 rename with cross-file reference support
  • Lambda and Map key support with type-aware editing
  • Lock keys or entire groups to prevent accidental edits
  • Drag & drop to reorder or move keys and groups across the tree
  • Add and remove locales without touching the source manually
  • Auto-refreshes when the file is changed externally
  • Click any cell to jump directly to that value in the source file
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0
  • Initial release
  • Side-by-side locale table editor
  • PSI-backed key/group add, rename, delete
  • Lambda and Map key support
  • Lock / unlock keys and groups
  • Drag & drop reordering and cross-group moves
  • Multi-locale add/remove
  • Auto-refresh on external file changes

action.description: Open the Lyricist strings file in the visual i18n editor
